{{Infobox technique
| name = The Dragon Descends
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[The Dragon Descends Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Dragon Descends is a powerful combat technique utilized by several individuals, most notably [[Lindon]]. When executed, the ability manifests as claws of red-and-black madra or black fire that swirl with destruction aura. [[Lindon]] has been observed condensing this technique around his hand to deliver devastating strikes, including a version that functions as a miniature iteration of the Void Dragon's Dance. The technique is capable of inflicting massive damage, such as blasting a target thousands of miles into space or striking a [[Dreadgod]]'s chest.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Dragon Descends]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Dragon Descends is a technique [[Lindon]] used at the end of his fourth-round match that is still unstable and takes too long to form.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] had previously beaten Sophara in simulations using [[The Dragon Descends]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] slammed the Dragon Descends technique into the [[Dreadgod]]'s chest.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] condensed [[The Dragon Descends]] around his hand.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] originally intended to use the technique known as The Dragon Descends to complete his battle against [[Northstrider]]. This specific technique is utilized by [[Orthos]] and possesses sufficient power to move a [[Dreadgod]], provided it is fueled by fire aura. During the confrontation, [[Malice]] managed to catch the technique upon her armored forearm. This action resulted in a detonation that filled the entire world with [[Void authority]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s plan was to finish [[Northstrider]] with [[The Dragon Descends]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Dragon Descends]] is a technique used by [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Dragon Descends]] technique has enough power to move the [[Dreadgod]] but requires fire aura.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] caught [[The Dragon Descends]] on her armored forearm.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Dragon Descends]] detonates and fills the world with [[Void authority]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
